tasks.label: Launch Docker App
tasks.command: docker compose up -d db redis backend

tasks.label: Retry Docker App
tasks.command: docker compose up -d db redis backend

tasks.label: Launch Full App
tasks.command: docker compose up -d web celery_worker celery_beat && docker compose ps && powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output $r.StatusCode } catch { Write-Output \"ERROR:$($_.Exception.Message)\" }"

tasks.label: Launch Full App Retry
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "docker compose up -d web celery_worker celery_beat; docker compose ps; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output $r.StatusCode } catch { Write-Output \"ERROR:$($_.Exception.Message)\" }"
